operational_knowledge_units.title: Main statistics provide core system statistics categories
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide identifies a statistics area described as Main Statistics for core system statistics and lists statistic types including Tippers, Estop, and Volume.
observed_evidence: Bullet: Main Statistics: Core system statistics
Sub-bullets: Volume (Total Exchanges, To Tipper, To Hospital)
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Overall System Statistics slide states that Main Statistics are core system statistics. Types of statistics listed are Tippers, Estop, and Volume, where Volume includes Total Exchanges, To Tipper, and To Hospital.
